jackhp95/elm-m3e bindings, generated by elm-cem from @m3e/web 2.5.12.

TS string-literal aliases are inlined from the shipped .d.ts, so alias-typed
enum attributes become shared design-token axes rather than `String`. Enum
attributes/properties are closed-row re-exports of the library-wide phantom
`Value` vocabulary in Cem.M3e.Common (no per-component unions). See
VENDORED_FROM.txt for the exact generator commit, source version, and command.
